## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Reproduction

Minimal code that reproduces the issue:

```c
#include "tr_datastructures/tr_stack.h"

int main(void)
{
    /* your reproduction code here */
    return 0;
}
```

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened. Include any error messages, return codes or unexpected output.

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| OS | e.g. Ubuntu 22.04 / Windows 11 |
| Compiler | e.g. GCC 13.1.0 / Clang 18.0 / MSVC 19.x |
| C Standard | e.g. C89 / C99 / C11 |
| Build type | e.g. Debug / Release |
| Library version | e.g. 0.1.0 |

## Additional context

Any other relevant information — stack traces, sanitizer output, valgrind output etc.
